title: Catalog.reserve/cancel_reservation drop the LoanService return value
evidence: catalog/service.py:27-31 — reserve() and cancel_reservation() are typed `-> None` and call self.loans.reserve/... without returning; LoanService.reserve (catalog/loans.py:52) returns a Reservation the facade discards
suggestion: Return the underlying result for API consistency (e.g. `return self.loans.reserve(...)`); harmless as-is since no requirement or test depends on the facade return value
